meta.title: Spectra Launcher — The modern launcher for modded Minecraft
meta.description: The modern desktop launcher for modded Minecraft. Instances, mods, worlds and skins — with built-in Modrinth & CurseForge browsers and every major loader, in one fast app.

hero.subtitle: The modern desktop launcher for modded Minecraft. Instances, mods, worlds and skins — with built-in Modrinth & CurseForge browsers and every major loader, in one fast app.

showcase.heading: Everything you play, in one place.

features.heading: Built for the way you actually play.
features.subheading: From a hundred-mod pack to a quick vanilla world — Spectra keeps it organized and lightning fast.

instances.title: Instance management
instances.desc: Organize packs into groups and favorites. Duplicate, configure, and launch in a click.

mods.title: One-click mods
mods.desc: Browse and install from Modrinth and CurseForge without leaving the app. Enable, disable, update.

skins.title: Skins & capes
skins.desc: Upload, preview in 3D, and switch skins and capes — Classic or Slim — right from the launcher.

worlds.title: Worlds & screenshots
worlds.desc: Jump straight into any world and browse every screenshot across all your instances.

fast.title: Fast & lightweight
fast.desc: A snappy native desktop app with managed Java — minimal fuss, maximum framerate.

themes.title: Themes & accents
themes.desc: Dark and OLED themes plus a palette of accent colors to make the launcher yours.

loaders.heading: Every loader. Zero hassle.
loaders.subheading: Create an instance with any loader and switch whenever you like.

download.heading: Get Spectra for your platform.
download.version: Version {version} · Java 17+ recommended (21 for newer versions).
download.buildSource: Prefer to build it yourself? Grab the source on {github}.

free.a: Yes — Spectra is completely free and open source under the MIT license. The full source lives on GitHub.

platforms.a: Windows, macOS (both Apple Silicon ARM and Intel x64), and Linux via .AppImage and .deb packages.

java.q: Do I need to install Java myself?
java.a: Spectra helps manage Java for you. Java 17+ is recommended, and 21 for the newest Minecraft versions.

loaders.q: Which mod loaders can I use?
loaders.a: Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, Quilt, and plain Vanilla. You can switch the loader on an instance at any time.

mods.q: Where do the mods come from?
mods.a: From built-in Modrinth and CurseForge browsers — search, preview, and install without leaving the app.

account.q: Do I need a Minecraft account?
account.a: A valid Microsoft/Minecraft account is required only if you want to play on online servers. However, you can also use an offline account to play in single-player mode and on servers that have the online feature disabled.

cta.heading: Ready to launch?
cta.subheading: Download Spectra and bring every instance, mod, and world into one beautiful app.

footer.tagline: A modern, open-source desktop launcher for modded Minecraft. Made by MakotoPD.
footer.legalLeft: © {year} Spectra Launcher. Not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft.
footer.legalRight: Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Studios.
